Component Categories

Every part your CCTV
system demands.

Manufactured with the same precision discipline as our brass exports — engineered for reliability in the harshest field conditions.

01
Connectors
BNC / RCA / DC Power

Nickel or gold-plated, crimp and screw terminals, strain-relieved boots. IP-rated options for outdoor and weatherproof installations.

View specs →
02
Mounts
Wall / Ceiling / Pole Mounts

Anti-rust coated hardware, tamper-resistant fasteners, swivel and fixed-angle variants. Precision-drilled for clean installations.

Mounting options →
03
Cables
Coax + Power Assemblies

RG59 / RG6 with matched power pairs, custom lengths, colour-coded and labelled. Kitted per site for faster on-site deployment.

Cable options →
04
Accessories
Baluns / Splitters / Boxes

Noise-shielded baluns, passive splitters, weatherproof junction boxes with compression gaskets for outdoor and coastal environments.

See accessories →
05
Custom / OEM
OEM-Branded Parts

Laser-marked connectors, custom overmolds, private-label packaging with QR traceability. Flexible MOQ for branded integrator kits.

OEM enquiry →
06
Materials
Marine & Outdoor Grade

Corrosion-resistant alloys, UV-stable plastics, powder-coated steel. Tested for Indian climate conditions — humidity, salt, and heat.

Material specs →
Deployed & Trusted

Installed across
1,000+ surveillance sites.

Why Choose Jaideep Enterprises for CCTV Parts

Reliability built into
every component.

22+ years of precision manufacturing means every CCTV component carries the same quality discipline as our brass exports.

🔧
Precision-Manufactured
CNC-turned components with documented dimensional checks — the same QA discipline behind our brass export lines.
🔌
Universal Compatibility
Connectors and accessories compatible with Hikvision, Dahua, CP Plus, Bosch, and all major surveillance brands.
📦
Ready Stock & Fast Dispatch
Standard parts available for immediate dispatch. Custom assemblies quoted within 24 hours with firm lead time commitment.
🏷️
OEM & Private Label
Laser marking, branded packaging, and custom overmolds for integrators who require their own branded hardware.
🌧️
Outdoor-Ready Materials
Anti-corrosion alloys, UV-stable plastics, and IP-rated assemblies built to handle Indian climate conditions year-round.
⚡
Site-Ready Kitting
We assemble and pack by site — matched cable lengths, labelled connectors, and hardware sets for faster field installation.
